pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh check logic
Task description and export_result.sh check logic
Task description, setup_task.sh and export_result.sh analysis logic

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real PCAP file (200722_tcp_anon.pcapng, 35 packets) downloaded from the official Wireshark sample captures repository. I verified through independent tshark analysis that the file contains exactly 0 TCP retransmission packets matching the required filter 'tcp.analysis.retransmission'. Consequently, a correct execution of the task will result in an exported PCAP file containing 0 packets and a report indicating 0 total retransmissions with no top source IP. Furthermore, the scoring logic in verifier.py makes it impossible to achieve the 15 points for the top IP since the ground truth IP evaluates to an empty string.
